headline: Truist Securities Upgrades SBA Communications to Buy, Raises Price Target to $247
summary: Truist Securities  analyst Matthew Niknam   upgrades SBA Communications (NASDAQ:SBAC) from Hold to Buy and raises the price target from $193 to $247.
